title.native: El Medio Ambiente y la Naturaleza

objectives: Use vocabulary for climate, pollution, sustainability, and conservation
Express concern and propose solutions using subjunctive
Engage with environmental debate using opinion structures

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Isabel
dialogue_blocks.text: Es urgente que tomemos medidas contra el cambio climático antes de que sea demasiado tarde.
dialogue_blocks.translation: It's urgent that we take measures against climate change before it's too late.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [es uɾˈxente ke toˈmemos ˈmeðiðas ˈkontɾa el ˈkambjo klimaˈtiko]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Rafael
dialogue_blocks.text: Estoy de acuerdo. La contaminación del aire en las ciudades grandes es alarmante.
dialogue_blocks.translation: I agree. Air pollution in large cities is alarming.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [esˈtoj ðe aˈkweɾðo ‖ la kontaminaˈθjon ðel ˈaire en las θjuˈðaðes ˈɡɾandes es alaɾˈmante]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Isabel
dialogue_blocks.text: Ojalá que los gobiernos inviertan más en energías renovables.
dialogue_blocks.translation: I hope governments invest more in renewable energies.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [oxaˈla ke los ɡoˈβjeɾnos imˈβjeɾtan ˈmas en eneɾˈxias renoˈβaβles]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Rafael
dialogue_blocks.text: La deforestación es un problema grave. Se han perdido millones de hectáreas de bosque.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Deforestation is a serious problem. Millions of hectares of forest have been lost.

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Isabel
dialogue_blocks.text: Para que el planeta se recupere, es necesario que cada persona haga su parte.
dialogue_blocks.translation: For the planet to recover, it's necessary for each person to do their part.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [ˈpaɾa ke el plaˈneta se reˈkupeɾe ‖ es neθeˈsaɾjo ke ˈkaða peɾˈsona ˈaɣa su ˈpaɾte]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Rafael
dialogue_blocks.text: Así es. Si consumiéramos menos plástico, reduciríamos la contaminación oceánica enormemente.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Exactly. If we consumed less plastic, we would greatly reduce ocean pollution.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [aˈsi es ‖ si konsuˈmjeɾamos ˈmenos ˈplastiko ‖ ɾeðuˈθiɾiamos la kontaminaˈθjon oθeˈanika]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Isabel
dialogue_blocks.text: Aunque el problema es global, las soluciones empiezan a nivel local.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Although the problem is global, the solutions start at the local level.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [ˈauŋke el pɾoˈβlema es ɡloˈβal ‖ las soluˈθjones emˈpjeθan a niˈβel loˈkal]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Rafael
dialogue_blocks.text: Exacto. Reciclar, usar transporte público y consumir de forma responsable ya es un comienzo.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Exactly. Recycling, using public transport and consuming responsibly is already a start.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [eksˈakto ‖ reθiˈklaɾ ‖ uˈsaɾ tɾansˈpoɾte puˈβliko i konsuˈmiɾ ðe ˈfoɾma resˈponsaβle]

feedback.correct: ¡Correcto! 'Es necesario que' triggers the subjunctive: 'reciclen' (ellos/ustedes present subjunctive of reciclar).
feedback.incorrect: 'Es necesario que' is an impersonal expression that triggers the subjunctive. 'Reciclen' is the correct subjunctive form.

exercises.instruction: Une el problema ambiental con su descripción

pairs.english: prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall
animal or plant at risk of extinction
emissions that trap heat in the atmosphere

exercises.instruction: Completa el texto ambiental con las palabras correctas

dialogue.speaker: Activista
dialogue.text: El _____ climático afecta a todo el planeta. (cambio)

dialogue.speaker: Activista
dialogue.text: Es urgente que _____ las emisiones de carbono. (reducir — nosotros, subjunctive)

dialogue.speaker: Activista
dialogue.text: Si todos _____ más conscientemente, el impacto sería menor. (consumir — nosotros, imperfect subj)

dialogue.speaker: Activista
dialogue.text: El _____ sostenible es posible si actuamos ahora. (desarrollo)

speaking_rubric.title: El medio ambiente y yo
speaking_rubric.scenario: Give a short passionate talk about an environmental issue that concerns you — what the problem is, why it matters, what you wish governments would do (ojalá), and what individuals can do.
speaking_rubric.prompt: Habla sobre un problema ambiental usando subjuntivo, hipotéticos y opiniones.

sample_response.text: La contaminación del plástico es uno de los problemas más graves de nuestro tiempo. Es urgente que los gobiernos prohíban los plásticos de un solo uso. Ojalá que más empresas adopten materiales biodegradables. Si todos recicláramos más, reduciríamos enormemente el impacto en los océanos.
sample_response.ipa: [la kontaminaˈθjon ðel ˈplastiko es uno ðe los pɾoˈβlemas ˈmas ˈɡɾaβes]

cultural_notes.formality: Mexico has significant environmental challenges — urban air quality, deforestation in the Amazon and Oaxacan forests, and plastic waste in coastal areas. Environmental consciousness is growing rapidly among younger Mexicans.
cultural_notes.gestures: Spreading arms wide while saying 'el planeta' evokes the scale of environmental issues in talks and debates.
cultural_notes.regional_variations: Environmental vocabulary is largely consistent across Spanish dialects. Puerto Rico deals with hurricane recovery and coral reef degradation — 'el arrecife de coral' and 'el huracán' are important there. Spain focuses heavily on EU climate policy and 'las energías renovables'.
